scripts.lint: eslint lib/auth/session-constants.ts lib/firebase/client.ts lib/firebase/admin.ts app/\(workspace\)/admin/page.tsx app/\(workspace\)/dashboard/page.tsx app/\(workspace\)/dashboard/wizard/page.tsx app/\(auth\)/login/page.tsx app/\(auth\)/register/page.tsx scripts/set-admin-claim.mjs scripts/guard-auth-env.mjs scripts/guard-auth-architecture.mjs tests/auth/auth.test.ts tests/integration/integration.test.ts app/\(workspace\)/cbam/page.tsx app/\(workspace\)/cbam/SignOutButton.tsx app/\(workspace\)/cases/[caseId]/page.tsx app/\(workspace\)/cases/[caseId]/CaseWizardClient.tsx app/\(workspace\)/cbam/reports/\[reportId\]/page.tsx app/\(workspace\)/dashboard/reports/page.tsx lib/cbam/sectors/sector-adapter.ts lib/cbam/validation/readiness-assessor.ts lib/cbam/calculation/calculation-engine.ts scripts/guard-release-mandate.mjs scripts/generate-sample-reports.mjs tests/cbam-engine/sectors.test.ts tests/reports/sample-report.test.ts
